seoTitle: Nangwarry vs Nantawarra — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Nangwarry and Nantawarra. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Nangwarry and Nantawarra.
heading: Nangwarry vs Nantawarra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Nangwarry, South Australia and Nantawarra, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Nangwarry has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Nantawarra (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Nangwarry or Nantawarra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Nangwarry has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Nantawarra scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Nangwarry scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Nantawarra scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Nangwarry or Nantawarra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Nangwarry has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.38% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
